mapper.select: SELECT CUSTOMER_ID, DESIGNER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, PHONE, GENDER, MEMO, LAST_VISIT_DT, REG_DT, MOD_DT FROM tb_customers WHERE DESIGNER_ID = #{designerId} ORDER BY LAST_VISIT_DT DESC, REG_DT DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_customers (DESIGNER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, PHONE, GENDER, MEMO, REG_DT, MOD_DT) VALUES (#{designerId}, #{customerName}, #{phone}, #{gender}, #{memo}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_customers SET CUSTOMER_NAME = #{customerName}, PHONE = #{phone}, GENDER = #{gender}, MEMO = #{memo}, MOD_DT = NOW() WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId} AND DESIGNER_ID = #{designerId}
